title: PlayerConfig
description: Configuration object for the Gcore JavaScript Video Player SDK (@gcorevideo/player). Pass this to the Player constructor: new Player(config)

sources.description: List of media sources. At least one is required. Sources are tried in order; priorityTransport biases selection when both HLS and DASH are provided.

oneOf.description: Source URL string. MIME type is inferred from the extension (.m3u8 → HLS, .mpd → DASH, .mp4 → MP4).
Source object with explicit MIME type.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the media source. Required when the type cannot be inferred from the URL extension.

autoPlay.description: Start playback automatically when the player is ready. Must be paired with mute: true to comply with browser autoplay policies.

mute.description: Mute audio output. Required alongside autoPlay: true to avoid browser autoplay policy blocks.

loop.description: Repeat playback when the media ends. Intended for VOD (playbackType: 'vod').

playbackType.description: Stream type. Set only if known in advance — incorrect values cause UI glitches (e.g. DVR controls, seek bar). Omit to let the playback engine auto-detect.

priorityTransport.description: Preferred transport protocol when multiple sources are available. The player tries this transport first; falls back to the other if unavailable.

language.description: UI language code (ISO 639-1). Must reference a key in the strings record. Defaults to 'en'.

strings.description: Localization strings for the player UI. Keys are language codes; values are translation key/value pairs.

debug.description: Debug output level. 'all' or true enables full logging. 'none' or false disables it. 'clappr', 'hls', 'dash' enable per-subsystem logs.

dash.description: Configuration settings passed directly to the DASH.js playback engine. See https://cdn.dashjs.org/latest/jsdoc/module-Settings.html for all options.

poster.description: Configuration for the Poster plugin. Requires Player.registerPlugin(Poster).

url.description: Poster image URL shown before playback starts.

showForNoOp.description: Show the poster when no playback engine can handle the current sources.

showOnVideoEnd.description: Show the poster after playback has ended.

custom.description: Custom CSS background value applied to the poster element.

cmcd.description: Configuration for the CmcdConfig plugin (Common Media Client Data). Requires Player.registerPlugin(CmcdConfig).

sessionId.description: Session identifier UUID. Auto-generated if omitted.

contentId.description: Content identifier. Falls back to the source URL pathname if omitted.

googleAnalytics.description: Configuration for the GoogleAnalytics plugin. Requires Player.registerPlugin(GoogleAnalytics).

mediacontrol.description: Configuration for the MediaControl plugin (main control bar). Requires Player.registerPlugin(MediaControl).

logo.description: Configuration for the Logo plugin. Requires Player.registerPlugin(Logo).

link.description: URL to open when the logo is clicked.

position.description: Position of the logo within the player.

playbackRate.description: Configuration for the PlaybackRate plugin. Requires Player.registerPlugin(PlaybackRate).

speeds.description: Available speed options shown in the UI.

contextMenu.description: Configuration for the ContextMenu plugin. Requires Player.registerPlugin(ContextMenu).

errorScreen.description: Configuration for the ErrorScreen plugin. Requires Player.registerPlugin(ErrorScreen).

favicon.description: Configuration for the Favicon plugin. Requires Player.registerPlugin(Favicon).

faviconColor.description: Color to use for the favicon indicator.
